prestazioni: Engine swap to a Renault-Gordini Type 807 (2.7L PRV V6) with forged internals: Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Pair with a custom camshaft grind from Schrick (280° duration, 11.5mm lift) for high-RPM power delivery.

Forced induction via a Garrett GT35R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom intercooler setup from Bell Intercoolers (front-mount, 600x300x76mm core) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Supersprint with 4-2-1 headers and a 200-cell catalytic converter.

Suspension overhaul with Öhlins TTX40 coilovers (adjustable damping, 2-way compression/rebound) paired with custom polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1001K) and a reinforced subframe brace from Silex Tuning to mitigate chassis flex under high lateral loads.
estetica: Full carbon fiber body kit from APR Performance (A310-specific front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and hand-painted Alpine Blue accents on the wheel arches.
OEM-style headlight restoration with Hella H4 Bi-Xenon projectors (6000K) and custom LED taillights from LUX Automotive, featuring sequential turn signals and a smoked lens finish.

BBS RS-GT II 16x9.5-inch wheels (ET20 offset) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40R16) with custom center caps featuring the Alpine logo in anodized gold, paired with Brembo GT 4-piston calipers and 300mm slotted rotors up front.
